dimensions.label: Selection accuracy
dimensions.description: Whether the named skill was selected exactly.

dimensions.label: Selection confidence
dimensions.description: Whether a skill.selected event carried the correct primary skill id.

dimensions.label: Fallback behavior
dimensions.description: Whether failure was empty/fail-closed or drifted to the wrong skill.

dimensions.label: Prompt sensitivity
dimensions.description: Whether the same skill succeeds across simple, complex, and minimal NL variants.
